hero.title: Septic system cleaning and maintenance
hero.subtitle: Premium solutions for septic pits, tanks, absorption wells and grease traps.
hero.description: At SaniTank, we serve homes, businesses, restaurants, condos and job sites with organized processes, proper equipment and reliable support.
checklist.title: SaniTank process
checklist.subtitle: Assessment, suction, cleaning and recommendations.
about.imageText: Place a real photo of the SaniTank truck or team here
about.title: About us
about.text: SaniTank provides septic sanitation and maintenance services with a professional, clean and preventive approach. We help prevent overflows, odors, blockages and system failures.
services.title: Main services
services.item1.name: Septic pit cleaning
services.item1.text: Extraction and cleaning to reduce overflows, odors and waste buildup.
services.item2.name: Septic tanks
services.item2.text: Preventive and corrective maintenance for residential, commercial and job-site tanks.
services.item3.name: Absorption wells
services.item3.text: Cleaning and support to improve drainage and absorption system performance.
services.item4.name: Grease traps
services.item4.text: Ideal for restaurants, industrial kitchens, hotels and food businesses.
extras.title: Add-ons for a more complete cleaning
extras.text: These services are quoted separately depending on system condition, access, volume and required equipment.
extras.item1.name: Wall washing
extras.item1.text: Deep cleaning of internal surfaces or areas related to maintenance.
extras.item2.name: Filter replacement
extras.item2.text: Filter replacement based on condition, use and installed system type.
extras.item3.name: Solid extraction
extras.item3.text: Service with suction truck. Requires assessment and has a higher cost.
testimonials.title: Satisfied clients
testimonials.1.name: Escalón Residence
testimonials.1.feedback: Organized, punctual and very clean service. They explained the whole process.
testimonials.2.name: Central Restaurant
testimonials.2.feedback: The grease trap works much better now. Excellent service.
testimonials.3.name: North Condominium
testimonials.3.feedback: Good team, good communication and professional work.
testimonials.4.name: Job-site project
testimonials.4.feedback: They helped us with logistics and extraction. Highly recommended.

footer.description: Professional cleaning service for septic pits, septic tanks, absorption wells and grease traps.
